Buffalo Bills 2026 scouting report: inside linebacker Jimmy Ciarlo
Do Buffalo Bills fans view Josh Allen or Bruce Smith as best player in team history?
Marino, Parrino, Turner
stories.summary:
My apologies in advance to anyone I may have left out.



	 



	I'm an older guy, and I'm not very plugged into the internet in all of its modern forms. For example I'm not a podcast guy. However, recently I've watched a Parrino podcast and a Marino podcast, and I regularly look at stuff on Cover one, and I've developed a new appreciation for the quality of a lot of the coverage about the Bills that is out there. I know I left out some of the print media people who also are good, but I tend to see their work more often.



	 



	I just wanted to say that we're fortunate to have these people who do quality interviews with Bills coaches and players, and who do thoughtful analysis about what's going on with the team.

Throwback Thursday Bills at Dolphins 1983 Marino’s 1st ever start
stories.summary:
The rookie from Pittsburg was fabulous and showed a portent of HOF credentials from the jump! But Fergy went nuclear in this game, passing for career highs in completions, yardage and touchdowns! Joe Cribbs was his typical brilliant self as the game seesawed through nearly 5 quarters! Miami’s lone blemish vs Buffalo at home was a tie with the Bills back in the late 60’s! A point a minute thrilling/nerve wracking game!



	 



	Enjoy!

stories.title: Buchanan, Smith named finalists for NLL Awards
stories.summary: Buffalo Bandits forwards Dhane Smith and Kyle Buchanan have been named finalists for the NLL’s end-of-season awards, the league announced Wednesday.   Smith was tabbed as a finalist for both NLL MVP and Offensive Player of the Year while Buchanan is up for the NLL’s Sportsmanship Award.   It’s the second consecutive season both players are finalists for their respective awards as Smith is the reigning Offensive […]

Last Saturday’s defeat to the Georgia Swarm was devastating, given the rungs on the ladder climbed this season to earn a […]

stories.title: Bandits’ season ends with 1st-round loss to Georgia

Thompson tallied four goals and six assists to set a playoff career-high in points […]

That uncertainty continued into early February as a 3-1 start was followed […]

stories.title: Would you take less salary to win a Super Bowl?
stories.summary:
This came up in the Knicks thread, I think it's a good question:



	 



	Why don't more QBs take a serious pay cut to have a better chance to win a Super Bowl? I would happily earn 40/million a year instead of 60/million if it upped my chances of getting a ring by 35-40%. Lifelong happiness of accomplishing the ultimate. 



	 



	This is probably why I'm not a billionaire (hahaha), but if you have 10 million dollars in the bank, I don't feel like money should be your prime motivating factor. Ultra-wealthy people and their chlidren are not happier than people who make enough to live comfortably, from what I see.

stories.title: 2026 UFL thread.
stories.summary:
1. 60+ yard field goals = 4 points
	2.  One foot in bounds = catch
	3. Red zone penalties revert to half the distance to the goal. 
	4. The "Tush Push" is eliminated.
	5. No punting inside the opponent’s 50-yard line.
	6. Overtime: 3 alternating attempts per team from the 5 yard line.
	 
	7. Point aftertouchdown options:
	- 1 point – Kick from the 33-yard line
	- 2 points – Ball on the 2-yard line
	- 3 points – Ball on the 8-yard line



	 



	Season starts Friday, March 27.
